name: color_contrast
description: Detects background color behind text regions and adjusts overlay text/background colors for optimal readability. Uses WCAG 2.0 contrast ratios.
author: OptikR Team
use_case_description: Adapts overlay colors to match or contrast with the captured background for seamless or high-contrast display

mode.description: auto_contrast: Ensures text is readable against detected background. seamless: Matches overlay background to captured image background.

min_contrast_ratio.description: Minimum WCAG contrast ratio between text and background (4.5 = AA, 7.0 = AAA)

sample_size.description: Pixel area to sample around each text region for background detection

fallback_text_light.description: Fallback text color on dark backgrounds (hex)

fallback_text_dark.description: Fallback text color on light backgrounds (hex)

performance_impact.description: Adds ~2-3ms per frame for background sampling and contrast calculation
